query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workshops (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  slug VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  shortDescription VARCHAR(500),
  imageUrl TEXT,
  galleryImages TEXT,
  workshopDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  startTime VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  endTime VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  duration VARCHAR(50),
  venue TEXT NOT NULL,
  venueAddress TEXT,
  totalCapacity INT NOT NULL,
  bookedCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  price INT NOT NULL,
  earlyBirdPrice INT,
  earlyBirdDeadline TIMESTAMP NULL,
  instructorName VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  instructorBio TEXT,
  instructorImage TEXT,
  `includes` TEXT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'published', 'cancelled', 'completed') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  isFeatured BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  metaTitle VARCHAR(200),
  metaDescription VARCHAR(500),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

  metaDescription VARCHAR(500),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
